points.label: Help page: bold Se/cure wordmark slash no longer touches
points.summary: The bold DeepResearch.Se/cure wordmarks on the documentation page (e.g. in the 'Privacy in one line' box) rendered with the slash touching the e and c — the global .sl tightening (-.12em) is too much for bold ink. The page now scopes bold wordmarks to -.04em, measured with the new scripts/slash-gap.mjs ink-gap meter (slash-spacing skill). PASS: on your device, in the privacy box and the two other bold Se/cure wordmarks further down /help, the slash clearly clears the letters on both sides while still reading as one tight word; the plain (non-bold) 'Se/cure' near the end of the privacy section is unchanged.

actions.text: Zoom in on 'DeepResearch.Se/cure' inside the blue 'Privacy in one line' box — before the fix the slash touched the neighbouring letters in bold.
